Xenium experiments - challenges and lessons learnt

Scanner settings: slides are thinner and settings need to be adjusted
Binning: Binning 2 at 20x makes pixel size differences. Binning 1x recommended
Custom conjugation:
p27 was conjugated with Alexa Fluor 555 - unconj dilution 1:1000, conj dilution >1:2500
We will attempt CCNE conj with AlexaFluor 750 - since CCNE contains 0.2% azide
File management: some folders were transfered to P-Drive with incomplete information (not flagged by the computer) - this resulted in data loss and a cycle needed to be repeated
 Lots of antibodies did not work (6/17), despite same vials being successful in CellCycle Expansion!! Even in early cycles -> maybe these epitopes are destroyed? which are the reasons for this?

Cycle 6
